Headline: #67 67th-69th-71st , #94 California Temporary Reroute at 69th/Bell
ShortDescription: 67 67th-69th-71st , 94 California buses are temporarily rerouted : due to, street blockage near 69th/Bell.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#67 67th-69th-71st ,#94 California buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 69th, Damen, 67th and Western including normal route streets due to street blockage at 69th/Bell.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Howard-bound Red Line Service Delayed at Sheridan
ShortDescription: Howard-bound Red Line trains are standing at Sheridan due to a door problem on a train. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Howard-bound Red Line trains are standing at Sheridan due to a door problem on a train.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Kimball-bound Brown Line Service Delayed near Sedgwick
ShortDescription: Kimball-bound Brown Line trains are standing at Sedgwick due to a mechanical problem on a train Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Kimball-bound Brown Line trains are standing at Sedgwick due to a mechanical problem on a train. 

At this time, also consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
